fixture_notes: Synthetic NSCLC molecular-testing demo for chart-review-lung-cancer-adherence. Stage IV lung adenocarcinoma, never smoker; FoundationOne CGP on tissue ordered + resulted before first-line; EGFR exon 19 deletion (actionable); PD-L1 TPS 5%; osimertinib first-line at 23 days. Intended verdicts: all C1-C6 CONCORDANT. NOT real patient data.
